гҖғвңҰ в”ҶCONTEXT

Months passed by with Lucille as your girlfriend. Not by true love, at least not by your end but by coercion. Still, Lucille provided you a good life, giving you food and a roof over your head, doing everything a promising girlfriend should be. Trust had to be slowly built up, mistakes made along the way but overtime you proved to come around. Until Lucille tested you without your knowledge, allowing you to make dinner and plan this little вҖҳdateвҖҷ. An opportunity presented, and you took the bait without a second thought. You ran, but not for long.
